scope: zero-training expressivity audit of the smallest target-free parent-action pair interaction needed to break the failed Q1 unary coloring collisions

scientific_contract.unary_family: the exact equivalence relation induced by the current target-free parent-action site signature
scientific_contract.orbital_pair_upper_bound: species-pair counts on exact unordered-pair orbits of the faithful parent action; this is a carrier-specific mathematical upper bound, not a deployable orbit-ID lookup
scientific_contract.transferable_pair_family: species-pair counts grouped by target-free relabeling-invariant pair-action descriptors constructed from endpoint site signatures and the setwise pair stabilizer
scientific_contract.target_role: the observed assignment is used only to select its collision class and score representational identifiability; it is never an input feature
scientific_contract.normalization_role: the audit enumerates the complete current-unary collision class, not the complete factorial assignment space

audit.aggregation: carrier and material-balanced, with original train/val/test reported separately

decision_rule.pass: pair interactions are a supported minimal successor representation; freeze a separate IID oracle-C assignment protocol before any training
decision_rule.orbital_only: pair order is sufficient but the transferable descriptor is not; refine only the target-free pair descriptor and do not train
decision_rule.fail: pair order is insufficient on the current collisions; stop before training and audit the smallest necessary higher-order or assignment-level latent interaction
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot qualify assignment, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
